calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Craig L. Feder, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Avignon Julian, LLC and Innovistech Realty Co.
Plaintiff's Witness Alice Tse was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Hector Rivera.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 179 Julian Ave., , San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - $2,040.00
Costs - $240.00
Total - $2,280.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Continued To Apr-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Avignon Julian LLC is present. Represented by Alice Tse.
Attorney Craig Feder specially appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Hector Rivera is present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 remains on calendar.
